name: Persimmon Cookies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
3. Add the persimmon pulp and baking soda, mixing well.
4. Blend in the remaining ingredients (egg, flour mixture, cinnamon, cloves, salt, nuts, raisins) until just combined.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
7. Makes 3 dozen cookies.
